name: sandbox-file-intake
description: Phase 0 safety loop. Proves the system works before anything else runs. NOTHING ORIGINAL IS DESTROYED.

stages.name: intake
stages.description: Normalize copied file to canonical markdown

stages.name: fis-classify
stages.description: FIS classifies: type, domain, subject, slug, confidence

stages.name: bil-score
stages.description: BIL scores relevance: does David care about this?

llm_gate.prompt: Given this classification and relevance score, where should this file go? Respond with: vault, archive, review, or reject.
